productDisplayName: Nike Men AS T90 Black Tshirts
description: CompositionBlack T-shirt made of 65% cotton and 35% polyester, has a round ribbed neckline, short sleeves, grey panel detailing on the side seams, rubber print swoosh logo on the upper right chest and T90 transferred onto the upper left chestFittingRegularWash careMachine wash warm with like coloursWash inside outDo not bleach Tumble dry on lowWarm ironDo not dry cleanGear up for an aggressive game of football in this black T90 T-shirt from nike. The classic design is updated with grey panel detailing and bold T90 and nike logos, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable during extended training sessions. Team it  with track pants and performance shoes.
